noProject.title: No project open
noProject.description: Create or open a project to work on drawables.

header.notYetSaved: Not saved yet — Ctrl+S to save
header.showDuplicates: Show identical YDD files in the project
header.buildTooltip: Build the pack as a clothing resource (FiveM, singleplayer, …)

drawableList.sortOnlyInCategory: Reordering only works within a single category without a search filter
drawableList.duplicateTooltip: Identical YDD file used multiple times
drawableList.emptyDescription: Add YDD files or just drag them into the window.

inspector.title: Inspector
inspector.emptyDescription: Select a drawable to edit its details, textures and metadata.
inspector.bulkHint: Actions apply to the entire selection.
inspector.lockNotice: {{name}} is currently editing this drawable. Edits are still possible (advisory lock).
inspector.label: Label
inspector.hairScalePreviewOnly: Preview only: Hair Scale primarily affects hat props (p_head) during build. On a pure hair slot the 3D preview shows the effect, but the built pack does not produce it there.
inspector.filesHint: File names are assigned automatically during build from slot + number — the label is just a note for you and does not affect the pack.

texturePanel.clickToPreview: Click: show variant in the 3D preview
texturePanel.noVariants: No texture variants yet — add YTD files.
texturePanel.maxVariants: Maximum of 26 texture variants per drawable (a–z).

confirmDelete.descriptionOne: Removes the drawable from the project. The copied files stay in the assets folder. Undoable with Ctrl+Z.
confirmDelete.descriptionMany: Removes the drawables from the project. The copied files stay in the assets folder. Undoable with Ctrl+Z.

duplicatesDialog.title: Duplicate meshes
duplicatesDialog.description: These drawables use byte-identical YDD files. Deleting is undoable with Ctrl+Z.

importWizard.pickLocationTitle: Choose a location for the project
importWizard.newerAutosaveDescription: Please open the project from the start screen to handle the recovery.
importWizard.projectStepIntro: The import needs a target project. Create a new one or open an existing one.
importWizard.title: Import pack
importWizard.description: Scans a clothing pack folder (YDD/YTD/YLD) and adds the drawables to the project.
importWizard.folderIntro: Select the folder of an existing clothing pack. The contents will be analyzed and mapped automatically.
importWizard.noYddFound: No YDD files found in the selected folder.
importWizard.missingType: Some selected entries have no slot yet — please assign one or deselect them.

assignType.cancelledDescription: The drawables without a slot were not added. Already copied files stay in the assets folder.
assignType.title: Assign slot
assignType.descriptionOne: One file could not be mapped automatically.
assignType.descriptionMany: {{count}} files could not be mapped automatically.
assignType.descriptionSuffix: Choose gender and slot before they are added.

dropOverlay.title: Drop files here
dropOverlay.description: YDD, YTD and YLD are mapped automatically.

cloud.linkedDescriptionUpload: Upload your drawables to the cloud with “Upload”.
cloud.linkedDescriptionPull: The pack is at rev {{revision}} — “Load latest version” fetches the cloud state.
cloud.linkDescription: Connects this project to a pack on the atelier server so your team can work on it together.
cloud.noPacksFound: No packs found — create a new one above.
cloud.pleaseWait: Please wait — the window closes automatically.
cloud.conflictDescription: Rev {{revision}} already exists in the cloud — your changes are based on an older state. How would you like to proceed?
cloud.retryOnRemote: Retry on top of the remote state (force local)
cloud.pullConfirmDescription: Local changes that have not been uploaded yet will be lost. The cloud state replaces this project's drawables.
cloud.serverBuildTooltip: Builds rev {{revision}} on the server as a FiveM resource (ZIP artifact)
cloud.serverBuildRunningTooltip: Rev {{revision}} is being built — the result will arrive as a notification.
cloud.uploadTooltip: Upload the local state to the cloud as a new revision
cloud.linkWithCloudTooltip: Connect the project to a cloud pack (team sync)
